validation.detail: “Net income per share” found on p.5 (income statement), p.9 (Note 3) and in the press release. Diluted EPS $2.39 agrees across all three.

narrative: Q1 FY27 revenue of $81.6B is 85% higher than Q1 FY26 ($44.1B); diluted EPS of $2.39 is 214% above last year's $0.76. Gross margin 74.9% held essentially flat sequentially (75.0% in Q4 FY26).

confidence.summary: Three corroborating sources for diluted EPS, clean validation, earnings direction agrees with the price trend.

factors.detail: Three sources, no conflicts, all marked verified.

factors.detail: Revenue and EPS both climb monotonically through FY25 → Q1 FY26.
